title.en: Moreover, it takes a long time for such a demon...

content.en:
A kind of perfect controller was envious of the Wudao Tower for picking up the treasure, because they all knew that Ye Tian was not a demonic genius cultivated by the Wudao Pagoda from a weak age, but a demonic genius who joined the Wudao Pagoda halfway.

Basically, the geniuses and powerhouses of the Wudao Tower today are all descendants of the descendants of the lineage or the perfect controller, and there are still very few demonic geniuses who join the Wudao Tower halfway.

And a demonic genius like Ye Tian is not unheard of in the history of the Eternal Ruins, but they are all the descendants of the perfect controller, and they have been cultivating with all their strength from the beginning, so they can hope to achieve such an achievement.

Moreover, it takes a long time for such a demon to hope for one to be born.

Therefore, these forces are naturally even more envious of the Wudao Tower, which is equivalent to being a demonic genius member for nothing!

Time passed slowly, and gradually, the game began to almost come to an end.

this day.

All the competitions were over, and the final eighteen peak half-step perfect controllers were decided, and they won the place to enter Shilongyuan.

Of course.

Even if you enter the Shilong Abyss, it doesn't mean that you can obtain the Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit, the ultimate thing.

After all, the number of Hundred Desolation Golden Fruits would not exceed ten, but there were as many as eighteen half-step perfect controllers who had entered the peak of Shilongyuan, so the competition was also very great.

However, Shilongyuan is not only the opportunity of the Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit, there may be few other opportunities, but it is also very good, and the resources here are also very rich.

Therefore, even if you can't grab the Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit when you enter Shilongyuan, you won't come in vain.

Although the quota was decided, the eighteen peak half-step perfect controllers did not immediately enter the stone dragon abyss, but waited for the orders of the perfect masters.

However, within the Shilong Yuan, a group of perfect controllers encountered some problems.

......

The depths of Shilongyuan's time and space.

Many Perfect Masters were blessing the seal, but they found that there was a problem in the stone dragon abyss.

A trace of the stone dragon demon lord's breath actually leaked out.

"Lord Xuanluo, what's going on, didn't you say there was no problem before, why did the Stone Dragon Demon Lord's aura leak out?"

The Lord of Xuanluo was also a little stunned, "Our Nameless Mountain will come to check every hundred eternal years, there was absolutely no problem before, it should have leaked some breath recently." "

"It doesn't have much impact, it should be that the Stone Dragon Demon Lord tried to break the seal and kept studying the seal, so he let some breath leak out, but he couldn't get out by himself, and some breath spread out, which was useless at all. Said another perfect controller.

"Go ahead and seal it, and wipe out these breaths by the way!"

One by one, the perfect controller took action, erased these breaths, and then continued to strengthen the seal, and also added a new seal, otherwise if the seal was the same every time, it would be easy for the stone dragon demon lord to break the seal.

Time passed slowly, and these perfect masters finally completed the seal completely.

"Let's go!"

The Lord of Time left the Stone Dragon Abyss and returned to the Stone Dragon Holy City, informing those who were half-step perfect controllers that they could go to the Stone Dragon Abyss.

......

"Finally ready to get in!"

Ye Tian said expectantly.

The other seventeen peak half-step perfect controllers were also extremely looking forward to it, after all, once they entered the Shilong Yuan, they had the hope of obtaining the Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit, the ultimate thing.

Airplanes!!!

A space-time passage emerged, and eighteen peak half-step perfect controllers poured into the space-time passage and entered the Shilong Yuan.

As soon as they entered Shilongyuan, everyone felt the oppression in the dark.

"How is this kind of suppression a bit like the original Bai Gu Yuan, but it is many times stronger than the Bai Gu Yuan's suppression!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But the reason why Bai Guyuan had that kind of suppression in the first place was that there was a perfect controller sleeping there.

Could it be that this is a similar situation here?

Ye Tian didn't think much about it, the most important thing was to compete for the Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit right now.

Whew!!

A pinnacle half-step perfect controller shuttled to the location of the Hundred Desolations Golden Fruit.

Before coming, they naturally learned the information about the Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit from the forces where they were located.

The Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit is located in the depths of the Stone Dragon Abyss, where there are many terrifying creatures, the most powerful is comparable to the peak half-step perfect controller, and the Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit is protected by the perfect controllers with the formation, so these Stone Dragon Yuan creatures can't enter the formation to snatch the Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit.

Therefore, these peak half-step perfect controllers had to cross these stone dragon abyss creatures and enter the formation before they could snatch those Hundred Desolation Golden Fruits.

The Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit was born on the Hundred Desolation Golden Vine, and each piece of the Golden Vine was separated, so every peak half-step perfect controller could only snatch one Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit, and it was impossible to snatch more Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit.

Soon, these peak half-step perfect controllers were intercepted by the powerful creatures of the Stone Dragon Yuan.

Thundered!!!

The battle is on!

Ye Tian also encountered some Stone Dragon Yuan creatures, and the other creatures were all weak, but among them was a terrifying creature comparable to the peak half-step perfect controller level.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian shot with all his might, and his combat power was fully opened.

The Devouring Domain directly absorbed the power of those weak creatures, crushing them.

It can be said that the Devouring Domain, which has been perfected to the top of the Perfect Control Technique, is extremely terrifying, and the creatures under the peak half-step Perfect Control are almost impossible to compete with, and they will be killed in an instant.

And the stone dragon abyss that was comparable to the pinnacle half-step perfect controller level was not Ye Tian's opponent, and was knocked away by Ye Tian's blow.

Ye Tian didn't want to fight with it, after all, it was more important to snatch the Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit.

......

In the depths of the Shilong Abyss, outside the magic circle where the Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit is located, there is a grass here.

However, this grass is not an ordinary grass, but a plant-like life.

It was good at concealing its aura, and in fact it had already reached the level of a peak half-step perfect master.

However, at this moment, there was a trace of black aura inside its body.

If those perfect controllers were there, they would know that this trace of black aura was the breath of the Stone Dragon Demon Lord, which was absorbed and refined by it, but due to its own innate ability, it hid this trace of aura.

If those Perfect Masters strictly inspected its body, they could still see through the abnormalities, but the Perfect Masters didn't expect that this grass actually hid the aura of the Stone Dragon Demon Lord.

At this moment, this grass fused with the aura of the Stone Dragon Demon Lord, and gradually broke the shackles and became a life comparable to the level of the perfect controller.

Rumble!!!!

Endless energy was absorbed by it, and the grass was about to break through.

At the same time, the perfect controller outside the stone dragon abyss noticed the situation here and immediately frowned.

"Shi Longyuan has a problem, do you want to stop it?"

These perfect controllers considered.

But after pondering the many perfect controllers, they absolutely did not interfere.

Although there will be a peak half-step perfect controller falling this time, but after all, it is not the real body, and if it dies, it will die, and the impact is not great, and it is dangerous to enter Shilongyuan, so there can be no danger, so just interrupt it temporarily.

"Don't worry, this barren golden grass has become a pseudo-perfect controller at most, it has absorbed the breath power of the stone dragon demon lord, and it can't become a real perfect master, they still have hope to break through. "

A perfectly controlled man of immense power spoke.
